---
title: "ADHD Adults Diagnosis"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## 

```{r}
source("setup.R")
```

```{r}


list_res <- lapply(categories, function(category) {
  d <- dplyr::arrange(d, ID)
  d_sens <- d %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(!!rlang::sym(glue::glue("sensitivity_", category))))
  ids_sens <- paste0(d_sens$ID, collapse = ", ")
  d_spec <- d %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(!!rlang::sym(glue::glue("specificity_", category))))
  ids_spec <- paste0(d_sens$ID, collapse = ", ")
 df <-    data.frame(
      category = c(category, category),
      measure = c("sensitivity", "specificity"),
      ids = c(ids_sens, ids_spec)
    )
   return(df)
})
  

df_res <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  list_res
)

knitr::kable(df_res)
```
